---
title: "Day 2 — Methodological Exploration"
subtitle: "Tuesday 16 June 2026"
---

*Hands-on analysis: groups explore the data, develop analysis plans for their chosen question, and compare approaches with other groups.*

## Schedule

| Time | Activity |
|------|----------|
| 9:00–10:00 | Small group work: explore data, develop analysis plans, begin implementation |
| 10:00–10:30 | Morning break |
| 10:30–12:00 | Continue analyses · Prepare preliminary findings |
| 12:00–12:30 | **Keynote:** IDM perspective — case studies illustrating challenges and areas for collaboration |
| 12:30–14:00 | Lunch |
| 14:00–15:30 | **Intergroup session:** Groups compare analysis plans · Separate and refine |
| 15:30–16:00 | Afternoon break |
| 16:00–17:00 | **Plenary:** Discuss findings across groups |
| 18:30 | Conference dinner |

---

## Materials

### Keynote Slides

Sam Abbott (LSHTM) - How to serial interval
[View slide](assets/presentations/how-to-serial-interval.html){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}
[Git repo](https://github.com/seabbs/how-to-serial-interval){.btn .btn-outline-primary target="_blank"}

### Group Analysis Plans

*Groups will share their analysis plan documents here*
